protein_name: Activates the JUN N-terminal pathway. Belongs to the protein kinase superfamily. STE Ser/Thr protein kinase family. MAP kinase kinase kinase subfamily. Expressed in brain and skeletal muscle. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
